title: Q3 Roadmap Planning
summary: Reviewed Q3 priorities across the platform and growth workstreams. Agreed to ship the notifications revamp before the analytics dashboard rework. Budget for the new analytics vendor still needs sign-off.
notes:
We walked through the Q3 roadmap draft. Notifications revamp is the top priority since support tickets about missed alerts are up 20%. Analytics dashboard rework slips to late Q3.

- [ ] Maya to finalize the notifications revamp spec by end of week
- [ ] Dev to scope backend changes needed for push notification batching
TODO: Sri to get budget sign-off from finance for the new analytics vendor
- [ ] Priya to draft the Q3 roadmap doc and share with leadership
Action: @Dev to spike on WebSocket vs polling for real-time notification delivery

Open question: do we need a feature flag rollout for notifications or can we ship directly to all users? Decided to revisit after Dev's spike.

title: Weekly Eng Sync
summary: Standup-style sync covering CI flakiness, the staging environment outage, and code review backlog.
notes:
CI has been flaky on the integration test suite for two days, blocking several PRs. Staging went down briefly yesterday due to a database connection pool exhaustion issue, resolved but needs a permanent fix. Code review backlog is growing.

TODO: Alex to investigate flaky integration tests in the checkout suite
- [ ] Jordan to increase the staging DB connection pool limit and add alerting
Action: @Sri to triage the code review backlog and reassign stale PRs
- [x] Dev fixed the staging outage hotfix and deployed it this morning

No other blockers reported. Next sync same time next week.

title: Design Review: Onboarding Flow
summary: Reviewed the redesigned onboarding flow. Overall positive feedback, a few accessibility gaps to close before it ships.
notes:
Walked through the new 3-step onboarding flow in Figma. Feedback was largely positive - simpler than the current 5-step flow. Casey flagged two accessibility issues: low contrast on the progress indicator and missing focus states on the skip button.

- [ ] Casey to update the progress indicator color contrast to meet WCAG AA
TODO: Priya to add visible focus states to all onboarding buttons
Action: @Sri to schedule a follow-up usability test with 5 new users
- [ ] Priya to update the onboarding copy for step 2 based on today's feedback

Target: ship behind a feature flag to 10% of new signups next sprint.

title: Customer Feedback Debrief
summary: Reviewed the last batch of customer interviews. Top themes: confusing pricing page, desire for a mobile app, and slow export feature.
notes:
Went through 8 customer interviews from the past two weeks. Three separate customers mentioned the pricing page is confusing, particularly around the enterprise tier. Two customers asked about a mobile app. Export feature is reported as slow for large datasets.

TODO: Maya to rewrite the pricing page copy and get it in front of 3 customers for feedback
- [x] Jordan already filed a bug for the slow CSV export and it's in the backlog
Action: @Sri to summarize interview themes and share with the product team
- [ ] Jordan to profile the export feature and identify the bottleneck

Mobile app request logged as a future consideration, not prioritized this quarter.

title: 1:1 with Manager
summary: Career growth check-in and discussion of current project load.
notes:
Good check-in on career goals - Sri interested in growing into more of a technical lead role. Discussed current project load feels balanced but the analytics vendor sign-off has been a recurring blocker.

- [ ] Sri to draft a one-pager on technical lead responsibilities to discuss next 1:1
TODO: Alex to loop in finance directly about the analytics vendor budget delay

No other action items - mostly a check-in conversation.

notes:
Discussed launch messaging and channels for the notifications revamp once it ships. Casey will lead visual assets, Priya owns the blog post and changelog entry.
